title: Windchill: Participants and Teams
description: Plan and associate participants with the roles, groups, context teams, and access needed for business processes. Create new accounts, assign license profiles, and launch queries for license planning and audit.

modules.title: Participants
modules.description: Identify participants and participant architecture in Windchill. Understand how organizations, groups, and users are stored across the directory server and Windchill database.

modules.title: Groups, Profiles, and Licensing
modules.description: Manage user groups, assign license profiles, and understand how license groups and standard profiles control feature visibility and access in Windchill.

modules.title: Teams and Roles
modules.description: Configure context teams, shared teams, and team templates. Understand role types, team instances, and how role resolution drives access control and workflow assignment.

modules.title: Managing Participants and Reports
modules.description: Update and delete participant accounts, understand system and business process implications of deletion, and generate audit and license usage reports.
